latestHandover: 58 findings, 103 open tasks, 12 phases (2 PLAN + 9 IMPLEMENT + 1 FINAL). ARCHITECTURE: k3s on Windows 11 Pro Hyper-V (Intel i7-265KF/32GB/1TB) — homelab-as-production deliberate choice (hospital power grid, 500/50 Mbps fibre). Vault OSS: YubiKey USB-C PKCS#11 primary unseal + TPM 2.0 secondary. Calico CNI, kube-prometheus-stack, Loki, Falco, cert-manager (Let's Encrypt DNS-01 wildcard *.commonbond.au), Traefik, Cloudflare Tunnel. Slack-only notifications (2 webhooks in Vault KV). Edge Functions: git-tag versioning (fn/<name>/vX.Y.Z). Helmfile pins all chart versions with quarterly upgrade review workflow. ROUND 8 (final consistency pass): CICD-10 (Low: 5-layer post-deploy smoke test — Kong, PostgREST, Auth, DB canary, Storage — composite action at .github/actions/smoke-test, integrated in prod-deploy.yml + staging-smoke.yml + CI health gate; replaces --ignore-health-check workaround; Phase 9). PROC-01-T2 added (mandatory check matrix refresh after Phase 5, before Phase 12). DOC-02-T1 updated to extend ENV-09 doc rather than replace. ARCH-07-T2 corrected to Slack-only. ENV-08-T1 specifies VM crontab (not k3s CronJob). DOC-01 description updated to Vault guide (Bitwarden/Doppler TODO closed). ARCH-05-T1 includes community Helm chart caveat + DooD fallback for ADR-001. Phase 2 rationale cleaned (ISO-03 removed). DATA RESIDENCY: All backup storage must remain in Australia — Cloudflare R2 APAC (primary) + Backblaze B2 SYD (secondary). PHASE ORDER: P1(PLAN:ADRs+OPS-01) → P2(PLAN:Helmfile+PROC-01) → P3(k3s+RBAC) → P4(auth fixes) → P5(CI hardening+CICD-09) → P6(supply-chain) → P7(env tiers+backup+SEC-09+ENV-11) → P8(CI arch) → P9(prod gate+CICD-10) → P10(docs) → P11(ISO-03 SoA) → P12(branch protection FINAL). AUDIT COMPLETE — proceed to implementation.
